name: vizualni-admin-basic-usage
description: Basic usage example for vizualni-admin. This example demonstrates how to set up and use vizualni-admin for Serbian open data visualization. To get started: 1. Install dependencies with `npm install` or `yarn install`. 2. Run `npm run dev` to start the development server. 3. Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser. 4. Customize the configuration in pages/index.tsx.
